note: Sheets are sprite atlases — render with ctx.drawImage(sheet, sx, sy, sw, sh, dx, dy, dw, dh). Cell coordinates below are first-pass guesses derived from full-image pixel dimensions divided by visible grid; verify by drawing each rect into a debug canvas before relying on them. The 'visualLayout' field is the row/column intent, not a final authority.

ship-black-sheet.png.visualLayout: 4 cols × 6 rows = 24 cells (8 facings × 3 HP states). Rows 1-2 = full health (N/NE/E/SE then S/SW/W/NW), 3-4 = damaged, 5-6 = critical.

ship-green-faded-sheet.png.visualLayout: same as ship-black, but desaturated mossy green with eerie lime glow when wounded
ship-green-faded-sheet.png.flavor: GHOST SHIP — Flying Dutchman vibe, 'The Spectral'

ship-gray-faded-sheet.png.visualLayout: same as ship-black, but washed-out near-translucent gray

whale-swim-grid-v1.png.visualLayout: 4 cols × 6 rows = 24 cells (8 facings × 3 HP states, fire-themed critical — DEPRECATED in favor of whale-damage-grid)

whale-swim-grid-v2.png.visualLayout: 2 cols × 4 rows = 8 cells, alive-only standalone swim pose

whale-damage-grid.png.visualLayout: 4 cols × 6 rows = 24 cells (8 facings × 3 HP states with proper blood damage). Replaces v1.

whale-master-sheet.png.visualLayout: Top: 8 facings towing grid (2 rows × 4 cols). Middle: 3 cutscene panels (ramming strike, dead prize on bottom, bubbles & debris). Bottom: isolated whale carcass + isolated ship.

whale-breach-anim.png.visualLayout: Top panel: hidden-underwater silhouette + bubble hint. Below: 3-frame breach animation (rise → mid → splash).

whale-breach-cinematic.png.visualLayout: 5-frame dramatic breach cinematic (full-jump arc → fall → mega-splash → settle).

whale-ram-anim.png.visualLayout: Top: 2 frames underwater silhouette approaching barrel. Below: 3 frames surface → ram → settle.

whale-idle-side.png.visualLayout: Single isolated alive whale, side profile.

whale-idle-surfaced.png.visualLayout: Single half-submerged whale with water-line, mood shot.

board-tiles-v1.png.visualLayout: v1, non-arctic. 4 water tiles + 3 islands + 2 center islands + harbor (1 wide composition) + 1 frame piece. FALLBACK — v2 supersedes.

board-tiles-v2.png.visualLayout: v2 ARCTIC THEME, canonical. 4 water tiles + 4 islands + 2 center islands (skull + rocky) + 2 separate harbor tiles + multi-piece edge/corner frame.
